name: ASUS ROG MAXIMUS Z890 HERO BTF ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - Supports DDR5-9200+(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - 6x M.2 Slots - 2x Thunderbolt 4 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - Intel 2.5Gb LAN - Realtek 5Gb LAN - 802.11be 2x2 Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4

description: ASUS ROG MAXIMUS Z890 HERO BTF high-end ATX motherboard with PCIe 5.0, DDR5, and Wi-Fi 7 for Intel LGA 1851 enthusiasts.
